name: Classic Minestrone Soup Con Pesto Alla Genove
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onions, leeks, carrots, celery, and potatoes. Cook until the vegetables are soft.
2. Add the soaked and cooked dry beans (still hard) and eggplant to the pot. Stir and cook for a few minutes.
3. Pour in the hot chicken broth and boiling water. Season with salt and pepper. Bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, until the potatoes are tender, about 1 hour.
5. Add cabbage, spinach, zucchini, and pasta to the soup. If the soup is too thick, add more hot chicken broth or boiling water as needed.
6. When all ingredients are cooked through, stir in the pesto sauce and serve immediately.
